zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook於1390年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯時，他的父親Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook30歲，母親Anna Chamberlain23歲。他於1418年與Margaret Pilkington結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1436年10月12日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook于1390年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯时，他的父亲Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook30岁，母亲Anna Chamberlain23岁。他于1418年与Margaret Pilkington结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1436年10月12日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Griffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gruffin, Griffin, a pet form of Middle Welsh Gruffudd. In the Welsh border counties this name was introduced directly from Welsh, and in the eastern counties of England by Bretons from France who came over with the Norman conquest.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha ‘descendant of Gríobhtha’, a personal name from gríobh ‘gryphon’.

variants.name: Griffee
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffy
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffey
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook was born in 1390, in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook, was 30 and his mother, Anna Chamberlain, was 23. He married Margaret Pilkington in 1418. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died on 12 October 1436, in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook est né en 1390, à Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna Chamberlain, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Pilkington en 1418. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1436, à Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook 1390 in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook 30 und seine Mutter Anna Chamberlain 23. Er hat 1418 Margaret Pilkington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1436 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook è nato il nel 1390 nel Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Anna Chamberlain, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Pilkington nel 1418. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì il 12 ottobre 1436, nel Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrookが1390年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリクスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrookは30歳，母Anna Chamberlainは23歳であった。1418年にMargaret Pilkingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は1436年10月12日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリクスウオルスで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook(이)가 1390년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브리스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Chamberlain(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1418년 Margaret Pilkington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1436년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브리스워스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook nasceu em 1390, em Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna Chamberlain, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Pilkington em 1418. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1436, em Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook родился в 1390 г. в местности бриксворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Chamberlain, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Pilkington в 1418 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер 12 октября 1436 г. в местности бриксворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook nació en 1390, en Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anna Chamberlain, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Pilkington en 1418. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1436, en Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
